subcodes.first_line: O Nightingale of the garden of meanings! For some time no melody from that dawn-bird hath reached the ears of the eager ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عندلیب حدیقه معانی مدتی بود که نغمه از آن مرغ سحری بسمع مشتاقان نرسیده بود
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for protection
